d:
Passive. Elijah and Lailah fight separately in battle but share the same HP and Energy pool. Their max HP is increased by [[50%]].
Active. Elijah and Lailah perform an inspiring duo dance, increasing all allies' Haste by [[60]] for [[7]]s. During the dance, allies linked through Stellar Bond become [[unaffected|uncontrol]]. The skill can be cast as long as Elijah is able to use Ultimate.
When actively used, extends the duration of the Haste bonus to [[7.5]]s.
When actively used, extends the duration of the Haste bonus to [[8]]s.
When actively used, extends the duration of the Haste bonus to [[8.5]]s.
When actively used, extends the duration of the Haste bonus to [[9]]s.

Elijah forms a Stellar Bond with Lailah when they align on the battlefield. Allied heroes placed in a [[straight path]] between the twins are also linked by Stellar Bond. Stellar Bond grants a permanent ATK bonus to all linked allies, including Elijah and Lailah. If no other allies are linked, Elijah and Lailah gain an ATK increase of [[25%]]. However, for each additional ally linked, this ATK bonus is reduced by [[5%]] for everyone linked by the bond.
Active. Elijah sends a golden glow through the Stellar Bond link to Lailah, restoring [[30]] Energy to each linked ally along the path. Simultaneously, Lailah sends a green glow through the Stellar Bond link to Elijah, healing each linked ally along the path for an HP amount equal to [[100%]]<ATK>.
Increases the Energy recovered by Elijah's golden glow to [[35]], and the HP recovered through Lailah's green glow to [[110%]]<ATK>.
Increases the Energy recovered by Elijah's golden glow to [[40]], and the HP recovered through Lailah's green glow to [[120%]]<ATK>.
Increases the Energy recovered by Elijah's golden glow to [[45]], and the HP recovered through Lailah's green glow to [[130%]]<ATK>.

Elijah grants Lailah and [[1]] [[weakest|weakest]] ally a [[150%]]<ATK> shield that lasts for [[4]]s and makes Lailah [[unaffected|uncontrol]] while the shield is active.
Lailah casts Stellar Pulse on the tiles occupied by Elijah and [[1]] ally adjacent to enemies, dealing [[110%]]<ATK> damage and inflicting [[blind|blind]] for [[4]]s on enemies within [[1]] tile of the target tiles. Stellar Pulse also knocks back enemies surrounding Lailah by [[1]] tile.
Increases the shield value granted by Elijah to [[160%]]<ATK>. Increases Lailah's Stellar Pulse damage to [[120%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value granted by Elijah to [[170%]]<ATK>. Increases Lailah's Stellar Pulse damage to [[130%]]<ATK>.
Increases the shield value granted by Elijah to [[180%]]<ATK>. Increases Lailah's Stellar Pulse damage to [[140%]]<ATK>.

Elijah and Lailah increase their Haste by [[9]] in battle. Each time they cast Starlight Waltz, they permanently increase the Haste of all allies linked through Stellar Bond by [[3]], stacking up to [[3]] times.

Elijah and Lailah increase their Haste by [[12]] in battle. Each time they cast Starlight Waltz, they permanently increase the Haste of all allies linked through Stellar Bond by [[4]], stacking up to [[3]] times.

Elijah and Lailah increase their Haste by [[15]] in battle. Each time they cast Starlight Waltz, they permanently increase the Haste of all allies linked through Stellar Bond by [[5]], stacking up to [[3]] times.

When a battle starts, if the allies (excluding Elijah and Lailah) linked through Stellar Bond all belong to the same faction, a special resonance effect is triggered. The resonance increases linked allies' Vitality by an extra [[10]] and their Energy gained by [[10%]]. After all linked allies have cast their Ultimates while resonance is active, the bond unleashes a permanent energy burst, inspiring all allies and returning them [[10%]] of their Energy cost each time they cast their Ultimate.
Increases the Vitality bonus to [[25]] and the Energy gain bonus to [[12%]] while the Stellar Bond resonance is active.
Increases the Vitality bonus to [[40]] and the Energy gain bonus to [[14%]] while the Stellar Bond resonance is active.
After Stellar Bond unleashes an energy burst, increases the Energy returned to allies from each Ultimate cast to [[15%]] of their Energy used.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 14 Haste, 15 Assistance.

d: Elijah and Lailah increase the ATK, Phys DEF, and Magic DEF of each ally linked through Stellar Bond. The increases for each linked ally are equal to [[15%]] of the highest corresponding stats among other linked allies, but cannot exceed [[30%]] of the original corresponding stats of Elijah and Lailah. These stat boosts are not included when calculating increases from this skill.
